'''fafushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iambelegus|iambelegus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iambelegus|iambelegus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fafushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæfishith|fæfishith]] || [[word:fæfishij|fæfishij]] || [[word:fæfishish|fæfishish]] || [[word:fæfishi|fæfishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafufushuth|fafufushuth]] || [[word:fafufushuj|fafufushuj]] || [[word:fafufushush|fafufushush]] || [[word:fafufushu|fafufushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafushuth|fafushuth]] || [[word:fafushuj|fafushuj]] || [[word:fafushush|fafushush]] || [[word:fafushu|fafushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafufshuth|fafufshuth]] || [[word:fafufshuj|fafufshuj]] || [[word:fafufshush|fafufshush]] || [[word:fafufshuf|fafufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fafushuthu|fafushuthu]] || [[word:fafushuju|fafushuju]] || [[word:fafushushu|fafushushu]] || [[word:fafushuku|fafushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fafushuth|fafushuth]] || [[word:fafushuj|fafushuj]] || [[word:fafushush|fafushush]] || [[word:fafushu|fafushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fafushuthul|fafushuthul]] || [[word:fafushujul|fafushujul]] || [[word:fafushushul|fafushushul]] || [[word:fafushukul|fafushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fafushuthuthu|fafushuthuthu]] || [[word:fafushujuju|fafushujuju]] || [[word:fafushushushu|fafushushushu]] || [[word:fafushuku|fafushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fafushuthun|fafushuthun]] || [[word:fafushujun|fafushujun]] || [[word:fafushushun|fafushushun]] || [[word:fafushukun|fafushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fafushuthuoro|fafushuthuoro]] || [[word:fafushujuoro|fafushujuoro]] || [[word:fafushushuoro|fafushushuoro]] || [[word:fafushukuoro|fafushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
